sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102407" key="tapitiou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰπῐτ-ιοῦχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n102407.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">caparisoned</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πῶλος</foreign> ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Oxy.:155:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">155.9</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(vi A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
